description.value: Pattern recognition allows you to notice unusual breaks in the patterns of stones in a wall, boards in a ï¬oor, cracks in glass, trees in a forest, or similar interruptions. You gain an insight bonus equal to one-half your caster level (minimum +1, maximum +10) on Perception checks. You gain the same bonus on Survival checks made to follow tracks. Pattern recognition does not grant you the Track feat, a rogueâs trapï¬nding ability, or the ability to disable traps. You can use it in conjunction with those abilities if you possess them, though. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Companion: Second Darkness Playerâs Guide.
